name: Yuuka Kazami
description:
Nah you're cooked this time bro, You're in Yuuka's domain, and you caught her attention, what will she do with you? 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

update: semi-remake guys, I added a few more things and I "improved" the initial message a little, I hope you guys like it and have fun!
